blog.title: The Journal
blog.subtitle: Reflections on architecture, the evolution of materiality, and the quiet luxury of the handmade.

posts.title: The Rhythm of the Hand
posts.excerpt: Why hand-troweled surfaces look different from machine-finished ones, and whether it matters.
content: Microcement is more than a mixture of minerals and polymers; it is a medium for human expression. Unlike poured floors or factory-made tiles, a hand-troweled surface carries the distinctive rhythm of the artisan who applied it.

This biological irregularity is what defines 'Quiet Luxury'. As architecture leans further into automated perfection, the subtle variations in trowel pressure and motion create a landscape that is uniquely yours. It is a material that records the process of its own creation.
When we speak of the 'Rhythm of the Hand', we refer to the meditative state our artisans enter during application. It is this focus that ensures the final texture is not just seen, but felt.

posts.title: Exploring Mineral Tonality
posts.excerpt: The same mineral surface looks warmer at dusk than at noon. Here's why.
content: Color in a mineral surface is never static. Because KUUS DESIGN utilizes raw earthen pigments, the tonality of the surface shifts as natural light moves across the room.
A 'Bone' white might feel warm and inviting at sunset, yet crisp and architectural during the bright afternoon hours. This interaction with the environment is a core pillar of our design philosophy.
We encourage architects to view our surfaces as living canvases. By selecting specific pigment foundations, we can align the atmosphere of a space with the natural rhythms of its geographic location.

posts.title: Bathroom Renovation Without Demolition
posts.excerpt: How to redo a bathroom without removing a single tile using Topcret technology.
content: Traditional bathroom renovations are synonymous with weeks of demolition, dust, and structural disruption. Microcement offers a sophisticated alternative: a continuous mineral skin that can be applied directly over your existing tiles.

This 'Zero Demolition' approach is possible due to the extreme adhesion properties of Topcret Microcemento®. By bypassing the removal process, we significantly reduce waste and project timelines while maintaining a monolithic, spa-like result.

The seamless nature of a microcement bathroom is not just a visual choice; it is a hygienic one. Without grout lines, moisture and mold have nowhere to hide, ensuring your sanctuary remains as pure as the day it was finished.

posts.title: The Definitive Guide: Microcement on Tiles
posts.excerpt: Applying microcement over existing tiles takes more prep than most people expect. This is what we do.
content: Can you really apply microcement over old tiles? The answer is a definitive yes, provided the substrate is sound. The primary advantage of this technique is the ability to achieve a modern, grout-free look without raising floor levels significantly.

The process begins with diamond-grinding the tile surface to open the pores, followed by a double-layer epoxy primer reinforced with fiberglass mesh. This creates a stable, non-porous foundation that prevents 'ghosting'—the visual telegraphing of old grout lines through the new surface.

At KUUS DESIGN, we utilize specific base-mortars designed to neutralize structural movement. The resulting finish is just 3mm thick yet carries the compressive strength of high-end architectural concrete.

posts.title: Sculptural Silence: Microcement Furniture Trends 2026
posts.excerpt: More furniture is being specified in mineral materials this year. Some reasons why that's happening.
content: In 2026, the boundary between furniture and architecture continues to blur. Designers are moving away from modular assemblies in favor of monolithic objects that feel as if they were carved from the room's very foundation.

Microcement furniture—cubical coffee tables, cantilevered dining surfaces, and seamless sideboards—serves as the ultimate expression of this 'Monolithic Minimalism'. The material allows for geometric precision while providing the tactile warmth of natural stone.

The trend is shifting toward 'Brutal Elegance'—pairing heavy, mineral forms with soft, organic textiles. A microcement object doesn't just occupy space; it anchors it with a sense of permanence and architectural intent.

products.title: Basebeton Collection
products.subtitle: Premium ready-to-use microcement systems. EC1 Plus certified. Available in 75+ colours.

basebeton-originale.name: Basebeton Originale
basebeton-originale.description: Basebeton Originale is a ready-to-use microcement paste with micronized quartz for walls, floors, furniture and worktops. Available in 75 standard colours and custom RAL / NCS colours. EC1 Plus certified — very low emissions.

features.title: Two-Layer System
features.desc: Applied in two distinct layers (Basa + Sense) for optimal depth, texture and durability on any vertical or horizontal surface.

features.title: Fully Waterproof
features.desc: Waterproof by nature — no additional sealers required. Ideal for bathrooms, wet rooms and kitchen worktops.

features.title: EC1 Plus Certified
features.desc: Very low volatile organic compound emissions. Certified safe for all interior spaces including bedrooms and nurseries.

features.title: 75 Standard Colours
features.desc: Available in 75 Basebeton Originale colours plus custom RAL and NCS matching for precise architectural specification.

details.maintenance: Clean with pH-neutral detergent. Avoid abrasive cleaners. Sealed surface requires no specialist maintenance.
details.philosophy: The definitive ready-to-use microcement — where simplicity meets architectural quality.

beton-cire.name: Beton Ciré Originale
beton-cire.description: Beton Ciré Originale is a cementitious two-layer filler with micronized quartz for walls, floors, furniture and kitchen worktops. Refined, flexible, highly durable with an authentic concrete aesthetic.

features.title: Authentic Concrete Aesthetic
features.desc: Creates a refined, authentic concrete look with subtle depth and variation — no two installations are identical.

features.title: Suitable for Wet Areas
features.desc: Can be applied in bathrooms and on kitchen worktops. Waterproof system suitable for all residential wet areas.

features.title: Flexible Application
features.desc: Flexible cementitious formula reduces the risk of cracking on substrates subject to minor movement.

features.title: Two-Component System
features.desc: Two-layer application system ensures consistent colour depth and superior adhesion on any prepared substrate.

details.maintenance: Wipe with damp cloth. Use pH-neutral cleaners. Re-seal every 3–5 years depending on traffic.
details.philosophy: Refined concrete aesthetics with the flexibility and durability professionals demand.

oxidestuc.name: Oxidestuc
oxidestuc.description: Oxidestuc is an easy-to-apply, ready-to-use paste with micronized quartz that gives walls, furniture and worktops a stunning metallic effect. Available in Gold, Bronze, Copper, Aluminium, Rust and Steel.

features.title: 6 Metallic Colours
features.desc: Gold, Bronze, Copper, Aluminium, Rust and Steel — each with a unique gloss level controlled by the degree of sanding.

features.title: Variable Gloss Level
features.desc: The metallic sheen intensity is fully controlled during the finishing process — from subtle satin to high-gloss polish.

features.title: Strong Adhesion
features.desc: Bonds directly to walls, furniture, shelves and worktops. No specialist primer required on prepared surfaces.

features.title: Ready to Use
features.desc: Supplied as a ready-to-use paste — open and apply. No on-site mixing required.

specs.label: Colours
specs.value: Gold, Bronze, Copper, Aluminium, Rust, Steel

details.maintenance: Polish with soft cloth to restore sheen. Avoid abrasive products. Seal with recommended top coat.
details.philosophy: Glamour and industrial craft — the only metallic concrete finish that improves with polishing.

natureplast.name: Natureplast
natureplast.tagline: Natural clay plaster for healthy interiors
natureplast.description: Natureplast is a natural decorative clay plaster for walls in dry rooms. Free of toxic substances, fully vapour-permeable and available in a range of mineral pigment colours. Supports a healthy indoor climate.

features.title: 100% Natural Formula
features.desc: Free of toxic substances — made from natural loam clay with mineral pigments. Safe for allergic and sensitive occupants.

features.title: Fully Vapour-Permeable
features.desc: Breathes naturally with the wall, regulating humidity and preventing moisture accumulation. No condensation problems.

features.title: Unique Cloud Texture
features.desc: Distinctive soft cloud-like swirl texture created during the second layer application — each wall is unique.

features.title: Healthy Indoor Climate
features.desc: Actively contributes to indoor air quality by regulating humidity. Recommended for bedrooms, nurseries and wellness spaces.

details.maintenance: Dry dusting only. Spot clean with barely damp cloth. Avoid excessive moisture.
details.philosophy: Where architecture meets wellness — a living wall finish that breathes with you.

sichtbeton.name: Sichtbeton
sichtbeton.description: Sichtbeton (literally 'sight concrete') is a high-quality cement-based coating with a special film-sheet technique that creates an authentic freshly-poured concrete appearance. Available in 3 modern grey shades.

features.title: Film-Sheet Technique
features.desc: Unique plastic film sheets are pressed into the wet cement to create authentic concrete texture, formwork marks and subtle variations.

features.title: 3 Grey Shades
features.desc: Three carefully selected shades of grey — each matching the tonal range of architectural exposed concrete.

features.title: Tension-Free & Diffusion-Open
features.desc: Dried material remains tension-free, diffusion-open and crack-resistant — ideal for large-format wall installations.

features.title: Segment-Based Application
features.desc: Designed for segment-by-segment application with laser-level accuracy, allowing precise large-scale installations.

details.maintenance: Wipe with dry or lightly damp cloth. Apply recommended sealer annually in high-traffic areas.
details.philosophy: The industrial concrete look — engineered to look genuinely poured, not applied.

basebeton-paint.name: Basebeton Paint
basebeton-paint.description: Basebeton Paint is a ready-to-use sustainable paint that creates a warm, industrial appearance on walls and various surfaces. Available in 40 unique colours. Applied with a block brush for a characteristic concrete-look effect.

features.title: Brush-Applied Texture
features.desc: Applied with a block brush using diagonal rainbow motions — creates a unique, characteristic concrete-paint texture.

features.title: 40 Colours
features.desc: 40 carefully selected colours spanning from warm off-whites to deep charcoals — all with an industrial, warm undertone.

features.title: Sustainable Formula
features.desc: Formulated with sustainability at its core. Low VOC, EC1 Plus certified for use in all interior spaces.

features.title: Easy to Apply
features.desc: No specialist tools required. Apply with a standard block brush. Suitable for DIY and professional application alike.

details.maintenance: Clean with damp cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals. Touch-up as required with same batch colour.
details.philosophy: Industrial concrete warmth — in paint form, without compromise.

basebeton-plus.name: Basebeton Plus
basebeton-plus.description: Basebeton Plus is a ready-to-use microcement paste with micronized quartz for walls, floors, furniture and worktops. The convenient single-component system is available in 64 standard colours plus RAL / NCS custom matching.

features.title: One-Pot Convenience
features.desc: Single-component ready-to-use system — no on-site mixing of multiple components. Open, stir, apply.

features.title: Waterproof System
features.desc: Suitable for bathrooms, kitchen worktops and wet-room floors. Fully waterproof when properly sealed.

features.title: 64 Standard Colours
features.desc: Available in 64 standard Basebeton colours plus custom RAL and NCS colour matching for specification projects.

features.title: Strong Adhesion

basebeton-xtreme.name: Basebeton Xtreme

basebeton-solid.name: Basebeton Solid

stuccopuro.name: Stuccopuro

story.title: About us
story.subtitle: KUUS DESIGN was founded with a singular vision: to create microcement surfaces that possess the permanence and weight of architectural heritage.

origin.title: How it started
origin.text:
It all started with a simple thought – we wanted to create spaces where materials and feelings meet.
We have always believed that a home is not just walls and a floor, but a holistic experience.

On this long and exciting journey of discovery, we tested different mixtures, felt every texture with our fingers, and watched how different surfaces play with light.

During this process, we developed a very specific taste. We realized that we didn't want to be just a reseller of a single product. We wanted to select the best materials that we 100% believe in ourselves, and bring them into your homes with our own hands – and with great passion.

Today, KUUS DESIGN is more than just an installation team. We are partners for those who appreciate interiors polished to the last detail. On our desk, you'll find both microcement installation and the design of thoughtful decor elements.

Along our journey, we have found materials and partners we trust in every project. This gives us the freedom to focus on what matters most: how to turn your ideas and dreams into a living space that offers joy for years to come.

For us, every project is a bit like creating our own home. We come, listen, and execute – exactly as we did in our very first studio.

philosophy.title: The Rhythm of the Hand
philosophy.text: Every surface is an original work, hand-troweled to create a subtle topography that machine processes cannot replicate. This artisanal rhythm ensures that light interacts with the mineral layers in a way that feels organic and alive, bringing a unique soul to every interior.

projects.title: Architectural Portfolio
projects.subtitle: A curation of exclusive spaces where materiality meets vision. High-contrast interiors that define the luxury of tomorrow.

boutique.name: TARTU LUXURY RESIDENCE
boutique.description: Luxurious interior featuring EcoCemento® mineral depth.
boutique.longDescription: A study in VOC-free materiality. EcoCemento® was selected for its natural mineral depth and healthy living profile. The 'Marfil' tonality provides a soft, light-diffusing foundation that evolves with the movement of the sun.

eramu.name: Private House Tartu 2026
eramu.description: Extreme durability meets high-end design with Baxab®.
eramu.longDescription: Defining the future of residential resilience. Topcret Baxab® was specified throughout to provide high-traffic endurance without compromising the monolithic design intent. Sculptural staircases and seamless living zones anchor the home's architectural soul.

lino.name: TARTU LUXURY BATH
lino.description: Monolithic wetroom aesthetics with T/Swim® technology.
lino.longDescription: Raw minerality meets functional luxury. Utilizing T/Swim® technology, we created a fully waterproof, slip-certified sanctuary where the absence of grout lines enhances the rhythmic texture left by the artisan's trowel.

spa.name: TALLINN RESIDENCE
spa.description: Modern residence featuring seamless microcement walls and floors.
spa.longDescription: In this Tallinn private residence, we applied seamless microcement throughout the floors and walls, creating a calm, flowing, and light-filled Nordic environment that harmonizes perfectly with wood and raw concrete.

faq.title: Architectural Specification FAQ
faq.subtitle: Technical insights into the performance and application of our mineral systems.

items.question: What is the typical thickness of a Topcret application?
items.answer: Our systems are applied in multiple calibrated layers, reaching a total thickness of 2-3mm. This ensures extreme structural density without altering existing floor levels or architectural profiles.

items.question: Is microcement compatible with advanced heating systems?
items.answer: Absolutely. Microcement possesses excellent thermal conductivity, making it an ideal surface for both hydronic and electric underfloor heating, ensuring efficient and even heat distribution.

items.question: What are the long-term maintenance requirements?
items.answer: The surface should be cleaned with pH-neutral agents to preserve the integrity of the seal. Regular maintenance ensures the patina develops gracefully while maintaining its protective properties.

items.question: Can it be applied over existing substrates like ceramic tiles?
items.answer: Yes. Our systems are engineered for universal adhesion. We prepare the existing substrate through mechanical grinding and high-performance priming, eliminating the need for costly and disruptive demolition.

business.title: Working with studios and developers
business.subtitle: We work with architects, interior studios, and developers on commercial projects. Hotels, retail spaces, restaurant fit-outs — if it needs a durable mineral surface, we can help.

hero.title: Monolithic Architectural Surfaces
hero.subtitle: Artisanal microcement systems in Estonia. Seamless mineral skins designed for architectural endurance.

philosophy.title: Materiality Defines the Atmosphere
philosophy.text: We believe surfaces should not just fill space—they should define the quiet within it. Each layer is hand-troweled, capturing a unique topography of light and shadow that evolves with the day. It is architectural precision, delivered with an artisanal soul.

methodology.title: Craftsmanship & Technology
methodology.subtitle: Precision in every layer. Our multi-stage application process ensures structural integrity and visual depth.

steps.title: Substrate Engineering
steps.text: The foundation of a flawless finish. We perform rigorous surface preparation—grinding, priming, and structural reinforcement—to ensure absolute adhesion and long-term stability.

steps.title: Artisanal Application
steps.text: The core mineral layers are hand-troweled by our master artisans. This manual process captures the unique rhythm of the applicator, creating a subtle topography that machine processes cannot replicate.

steps.title: Mineral Saturation
steps.text: The final aesthetic layers are applied with meticulous care, allowing each to cure naturally. This results in a dense mineral veil that responds dynamically to shifting light conditions.

steps.title: Molecular Impregnation
steps.text: We seal the surface with high-performance, matte topcoats. This creates a waterproof, scratch-resistant barrier that preserves the raw aesthetic while ensuring architectural endurance.

guide_topcret.title: The Guide
guide_topcret.subtitle: Technical mastery of mineral surfaces.
guide_topcret.description: Basebeton is a ready-to-use cementitious coating with micronized quartz, polymers and pigments. It delivers a seamless finish for floors, walls and furniture — without extensive construction work.

what_is.title: What is microcement?
paragraphs: Microcement — also called micro-concrete, micro-screed or micro-overlay — is a highly versatile polymer-modified cementitious coating that has been transforming interior and exterior design. Applied just 1–3mm thin, it bonds directly over existing tiles, concrete, wood and most rigid surfaces, creating a seamless and grout-free result.

Basebeton by Stone Age is a premium ready-to-use microcement paste. Each product in the Basebeton range is pre-coloured, pre-mixed and factory-calibrated for consistent results. It is EC1 Plus certified — meaning very low volatile organic compound emissions, safe for every interior environment including bedrooms and schools.

One of the key reasons for microcement's increasing popularity is its ability to deliver a sleek, minimalist and contemporary look to any space. With 366 colours and finishes across 11 product collections, Basebeton gives designers, architects and homeowners full creative freedom — from raw industrial concrete to refined metallic surfaces.

Basebeton's thin application minimises the impact on existing structures during renovation. No demolition, no raised floor levels, no construction noise — microcement is applied directly over what is already there.
Whether for renovation or new-build, Basebeton is the professional solution that elevates the aesthetic and functionality of any surface.

items.title: Microcement Flooring
items.desc: Basebeton Originale, Plus, Xtreme, Solid and Grit are all engineered for floor use. Highly durable, compatible with underfloor heating, and available in dozens of colours. Suitable for residential, commercial and high-traffic industrial spaces.

items.title: Microcement Bathrooms
items.desc: Basebeton creates seamless, fully waterproof bathroom surfaces with no grout lines. Applied directly over existing tiles — no demolition required. The zero-demolition bathroom is our most requested application.

items.title: Microcement Worktops
items.desc: Basebeton Originale and Beton Ciré are ideal for kitchen worktops. Heat-resistant when sealed, food-safe, and available in 75–41 colours respectively. Provides a clean, seamless surface that is easy to maintain.

items.title: Outdoor Microcement
items.desc: Selected Basebeton systems can be applied to patios, terraces and walkways. UV-stable, weather-resistant and slip-resistant finishes are available. Specify outdoor use at the consultation stage for the correct product selection.

items.title: Microcement Walls
items.desc: Basebeton Originale, Stuccopuro, Sichtbeton, Natureplast and Oxidestuc all work for walls, each with a distinct character — from raw industrial to natural clay or metallic shimmer. Applied to create architectural continuity between floor and wall.

items.title: Microcement Kitchens
items.desc: Seamless microcement surfaces work across kitchen countertops, backsplashes and floors. Basebeton is highly stain-resistant when properly sealed, and easy to clean with pH-neutral products. Custom colours ensure a perfect match to any kitchen design.

items.title: Microcement Stairs
items.desc: Continuous microcement stair surfaces eliminate edge strips and transition profiles. Non-slip finishes are available. Applied over concrete, wood or metal stairs — bonds directly to any prepared substrate.

items.title: Microcement Showers
items.desc: Basebeton Originale and Beton Ciré are both approved for shower enclosures and wet rooms. Fully waterproof when sealed, seamless, and available in a wide range of colours. Easy to clean — no grout lines where mould can accumulate.

items.title: Microcement Furniture
items.desc: Basebeton can be applied to dressers, tables, sinks, bathtubs and custom objects. Weight increase is minimal. Creates a unique mineral surface that is durable, stain-resistant and unlike any painted or veneered finish.

items.title: Microcement Pools
items.desc: Basebeton Grit and Basebeton Solid offer waterproof, durable surfaces for pool surrounds and wet zones. Applied directly over existing pool tiles. Custom colours are available to complement the water and surrounding architecture.

versatility.title: Versatility
versatility.desc: Apply to almost any surface — floors, walls, furniture, stairs and pools — including curved or uneven substrates.

durability.title: Durability
durability.desc: High resistance to daily wear, impact, stains and scratches. EC1 Plus certified for long-term indoor air quality.

customization.title: 366 Colours
customization.desc: 11 product-specific colour palettes totalling 366 curated shades. Custom RAL and NCS matching available.

waterproof.title: Waterproof
waterproof.desc: Waterproof by nature when sealed — ideal for bathrooms, showers, pool surrounds and kitchen worktops.

thickness.title: Minimal Thickness
thickness.desc: 1–3mm total application. No significant floor level change. No structural impact on the building.

flexibility.title: Ready-to-Use
flexibility.desc: Pre-mixed, pre-coloured factory paste. No complex on-site mixing — opens and applies directly.

eco.title: EC1 Plus Certified
eco.desc: All Basebeton products meet the strictest European health and environmental standards. Very low VOC emissions.

maintenance.title: Low Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Clean with pH-neutral detergents. Re-seal every 3–5 years. No specialist products required.

process_steps.title: Surface Preparation
process_steps.desc: The substrate must be clean, dry, load-bearing and level. Any cracks are filled and movement joints addressed. Diamond grinding opens the surface pores for optimal adhesion. This is the most critical step — it determines the longevity of the finish.

process_steps.title: Primer Application (MCG / Ecohecht)
process_steps.desc: A specialist primer — MCG for absorbent surfaces, Ecohecht for non-absorbent — is applied in one or two thin coats. On absorbent substrates it is diluted 1:1 with water. Drying time approximately 1 hour per coat. Optional fibreglass mesh reinforcement for added crack resistance.

process_steps.title: Base Layer — Basebeton Basa
process_steps.desc: The first microcement layer is applied with a stainless-steel plasterer's knife, spread evenly across the surface at approximately 1.5 kg/m². This layer builds structure and depth. Trowel marks at this stage create the topographic character of the finished surface.

process_steps.title: Finish Layer — Basebeton Sense
process_steps.desc: The second and final layer is applied over the dried base. It determines the final colour, texture and smoothness. Applied thin (approx. 1.5 kg/m²) with precise, rhythmic trowel strokes. This layer responds to light and gives each installation its unique mineral character.

process_steps.title: Impregnation & Sealing
process_steps.desc: A penetrating impregnator is applied first to stabilise the surface, followed by a polyurethane or water-based topcoat sealer. Available in matt, satin or gloss finish. Creates full waterproofing and long-term durability. Surface usable 24–48h after sealing.

guide_topcret.finishes_intro: Basebeton products are available in three standard seal finishes. The choice of finish affects the final appearance, sheen level and maintenance requirements of the surface.

finishes_list.title: Matt
finishes_list.desc: The most popular finish for luxury interiors. Flat, light-absorbing surface that emphasises texture and colour depth. Conceals minor marks. Ideal for walls, feature surfaces and residential floors.

finishes_list.title: Satin
finishes_list.desc: A soft mid-sheen that adds warmth and subtle luminosity. Enhances colour richness without appearing glossy. The most versatile finish — suitable for floors, walls and worktops in both residential and commercial settings.

finishes_list.title: Gloss
finishes_list.desc: High reflectivity that creates a bold, contemporary statement. Makes colours appear deeper and more saturated. Best suited for feature walls, reception areas and hospitality spaces where maximum visual impact is desired.

colors.title: Product Colour Collections
colors.subtitle: Every Basebeton product has its own curated colour palette. Browse by product or use the code for exact factory specification.

basebeton-originale.title: Basebeton Originale
basebeton-originale.description: 75 mineral pigment colours. Available in standard, RAL and NCS.

beton-cire.title: Beton Ciré
beton-cire.description: 41 refined concrete tones from Stone Age's architectural palette.

oxidestuc.title: Oxidestuc
oxidestuc.description: 6 metallic finishes: Aluminium, Bronze, Copper, Gold, Rust and Steel.

natureplast.title: Natureplast
natureplast.description: 16 natural clay pigment colours for organic, breathable interiors.

sichtbeton.title: Sichtbeton
sichtbeton.description: 3 architectural grey shades of raw exposed concrete.

basebeton-paint.title: Basebeton Paint
basebeton-paint.description: 40 mineral-named colours for warm industrial wall finishes.

basebeton-plus.title: Basebeton Plus
basebeton-plus.description: 64 colours named after the rhythms of French everyday life.

basebeton-xtreme.title: Basebeton Xtreme
basebeton-xtreme.description: 20 nature-inspired colours for heavy-duty epoxy floor systems.

basebeton-solid.title: Basebeton Solid
basebeton-solid.description: 21 refined tones for the strongest concrete floor plaster.

basebeton-grit.title: Basebeton Grit
basebeton-grit.description: 20 beach and landscape-inspired colours for grit floor systems.

stuccopuro.title: Stuccopuro
stuccopuro.description: 60 Italian-named colours for decorative concrete-look wall plaster.

popular.title: Popular Colours
popular.subtitle: The most requested shades by architects and designers.

custom_interior.title: Interior Art & Decor
custom_interior.subtitle: Mineral artistry beyond the surface. Each element is hand-molded by our studio.

items.name: Fresco & Lime Wash
items.description: Ancient mineral techniques creating organic, breathable wall surfaces with a soft, aged patina unique to every space.

items.name: Geometric Inlays
items.description: Precision-cut mineral patterns — from Muuristiili grids to strict modernist lattices — embedded directly into the living surface.

items.name: Sculptural Relief Panels
items.description: Three-dimensional decorative panels, hand-molded in microcement — for feature walls, headboards, and architectural niches.

items.name: Ombré Mineral Gradients
items.description: Seamless color transitions from floor to ceiling using raw clay pigments, without visible borders or seams.

items.name: Custom Mineral Murals
items.description: Large-scale hand-painted murals in mineral pigment — permanent, UV-stable, and entirely unique to your space.

items.name: Furniture Details
items.description: Decorative columns, arches, console tables, and fireplaces finished in monolithic microcement.

items.name: Sculptural Relief Walls
items.description: Deeply textured diagonal and organic reliefs that transform a standard wall into a dynamic architectural statement.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Guidelines for using Kuus Design studio services and website.

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.content: These terms of service govern the use of the Kuus Design website and services. By using the website, you accept these terms in full.

sections.title: 2. Services
sections.content: Kuus Design offers premium microcement installation and decorative surface treatments. Each project is unique craftsmanship, and the final result may vary according to material properties.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on the website, including photos, texts, and design elements, belongs to Kuus Design or is licensed to us. Copying content without permission is prohibited.

sections.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We do our best to ensure the accuracy of info, but we are not responsible for possible technical errors or consequences resulting from the interpretation of information.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your data security and privacy are our priority.

sections.title: 1. Data Collection
sections.content: We collect personal data (name, email, phone) that you voluntarily provide to us via the inquiry form so that we can offer you a personalized service.

sections.title: 2. Data Use
sections.content: We use your data only to respond to inquiries, plan projects, and communicate with you. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 3. Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies on the website to analyze traffic and improve user experience. You have the right to opt-out of cookies in your browser settings.

sections.title: 4. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right at any time to access your data, request its correction or deletion by contacting us via email.

visualize_cta.title: See it in your space
visualize_cta.desc: Upload a photo of your room, tap any wall, instantly preview Basebeton finishes with realistic texture and lighting.
